diagrams.name: game_startup_initialization
diagrams.title: Game Startup and Initialization Flow
diagrams.description: Platform launcher boots the application, Vars.init sets up core globals, ContentLoader creates base content and triggers async/sync load phases
diagrams.scope: Application bootstrap — platform entry point through content ready

diagrams.name: server_launch_and_command_registration
diagrams.title: Server Launch and Command Registration
diagrams.description: ServerLauncher starts the headless server, ServerControl registers console commands, NetServer initialises network listeners and packet handlers

diagrams.name: client_connection_and_world_load
diagrams.title: Client Connection and World Load
diagrams.description: NetClient connects to a server, exchanges binary packets, receives world snapshot, deserialises tiles and entities via TypeIO, and transitions to gameplay
diagrams.scope: Multiplayer client join → in-game state sync

diagrams.name: server_world_data_send
diagrams.title: Server World Data Transmission
diagrams.description: NetServer serialises map state via TypeIO, writes building/unit snapshots, and streams world data to connecting clients

diagrams.name: steam_multiplayer_session
diagrams.title: Steam Multiplayer Session Setup
diagrams.description: SNet establishes Steam P2P connections, SUser authenticates lobby members, SWorkshop handles mod discovery, SStats syncs achievements
diagrams.scope: Steam platform integration — lobby, auth, workshop

diagrams.name: player_input_desktop
diagrams.title: Desktop Player Input Handling
diagrams.description: InputHandler processes keyboard/mouse actions, routes build/mine commands to PlayerComp, transfers items, and queues preview plans

diagrams.name: player_input_mobile
diagrams.title: Mobile Player Input Handling
diagrams.description: MobileInput interprets touch gestures, checks overlap placement, manages line/area build modes, and delegates to InputHandler for item/liquid transfers

diagrams.name: unit_spawning_and_ai_assignment
diagrams.title: Unit Spawning and AI Controller Assignment
diagrams.description: Units.unitSpawn checks cap, UnitType.create builds the entity, UnitComp initialises movement state, AIController resets timers and assigns stance
diagrams.scope: Unit lifecycle from creation to first AI tick

diagrams.name: unit_ai_combat_loop
diagrams.title: Unit AI Combat Decision Loop
diagrams.description: AIController.updateUnit evaluates targets, delegates to fallback stance, UnitComp.moveAt steers toward target, triggers weapon fire via Weapon.update
diagrams.scope: Per-tick AI targeting and movement loop

diagrams.name: turret_targeting_and_firing
diagrams.title: Turret Targeting and Firing Sequence
diagrams.description: TurretBuild.shouldConsume checks resources, Turret.findTarget selects enemy, Weapon fires BulletType, bullet hits entity/tile triggering hitEntity/hitTile

diagrams.name: building_placement_and_construction
diagrams.title: Building Placement and Construction Flow
diagrams.description: Player places block via InputHandler, Block.drawPlace validates location, BuildingComp.create adds to world, Tile links to building, moduleBitmask updates neighbours
diagrams.scope: Build action from cursor click to live building

diagrams.name: pathfinding_update_flow
diagrams.title: Pathfinding Update and Cluster Management
diagrams.description: ControlPathfinder checks tile change events, updateTile queues cluster updates, getCreateCluster merges portal regions, AIController queries paths for unit movement

diagrams.name: sector_campaign_progression
diagrams.title: Sector and Campaign Progression Flow
diagrams.description: PlanetDialog shows planet, player selects sector, Planet.applyRules builds ruleset, SectorInfo tracks exports/imports, Rules propagate to game state
diagrams.scope: Campaign sector selection through rules application

diagrams.name: mod_loading_and_content_init
diagrams.title: Mod Loading and Content Initialization
diagrams.description: Mods.loadAsync discovers mod files, imports/validates them, ContentLoader.createModContent registers new types, loadIcons applies sprites, content init finalises

diagrams.name: server_admin_and_kick_flow
diagrams.title: Server Administration and Player Kick Flow
diagrams.description: ServerControl issues admin command, NetServer.votesRequired evaluates quorum, Administration.handleKicked persists ban, subnet/name bans enforced on reconnect
diagrams.scope: Admin moderation pipeline: kick, ban, subnet-ban

diagrams.name: entity_serialization_and_io
diagrams.title: Entity Serialization and IO Flow
diagrams.description: BuildingComp.writeAll/readAll serialise building state, UnitComp writes unit snapshot, TypeIO handles objects/payloads/mounts, EntityIO tracks revisions for save compatibility
